name: EASTERN CO
business: The Eastern Company designs, manufactures, and sells unique engineered solutions for industrial markets, primarily serving the commercial transportation and logistics markets. Their product line includes custom and standard vehicular and industrial hardware such as returnable packaging solutions, access and security hardware, mirrors, and mirror-cameras. They also provide proprietary vision technology for OEMs and aftermarket applications.

exposures.sentence: technological developments and enhancements of products and services offerings in our industry may require an expanded use of artificial intelligence ( AI ) and machine learning; if we are unable to keep pace with the rate of these and other developments, our ability to effectively compete could be adversely affected.

in 2025 the United States increased its Section 232 steel and aluminum measures, eliminating country exemptions and raising aluminum tariffs to 25% effective March 2025, and since June 2025 has imposed 50% tariffs on steel, aluminum and many covered derivative products from nearly all trading partners.
